description: All set to endure the harshness of the hill side, the fila Mountainaire shoes are perfect for those hiking expeditions. Made of pure leather, they are replete with style, comfort and long life. Team this with jeans and semi-formal shirts for those casual occasions and create a style statement of your own.Upper Nubuck leather upper for maximum comfort and durability Synthetic overlays along the toe box and lacing system for protection and durability Lace-up system for snug Fit Meshed and padded sockliner for maximum ventilation and in-step comfort Cushioned tongue with a meshed inner for enhanced comfort Stitch detailing for durability and style Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorption Cushioned footbed for comfort Outsole TPR outsole for maximum durability Multi-directional lugs in the forefoot and heel for maximum grip and traction on uneven terrain Flex grooves on the forefoot for flexibility Grooves on the heel for cushioning comfort Arched midfoot for ergonomic comfort shoe careRub surface using a nubuck brush to remove dustStore away from direct sunlight
